parents.subject: LU-19588 tcu: fix repeated deletion failure for remote dir

commit.subject: LU-19588 tcu: fix repeated deletion for non-empty remote dir
commit.message:
LU-19588 tcu: fix repeated deletion for non-empty remote dir

This patch fixes the failure of repeated deletion with the same
name for a non-empty remote dir.

Add sanityn.sh/test_118e to verify the fix.

Signed-off-by: Yingjin Qian <qian@ddn.com>
Change-Id: Ib4085f658c0c8d9d9682fbe17daed7ed61359024
